meta.title: Full Hand Analysis B
meta.description: More mixed scenarios at higher difficulty.

blocks.content:
## Full Hand Analysis B

More advanced scenarios. These problems layer in implied odds, bluff frequency, and multi-street thinking. You've got this — trust everything you've practiced!

blocks.title: Full Hand Analysis B
blocks.instructions: Advanced mixed scenarios. Some problems introduce implied odds and bluff frequency concepts. Think carefully through each one!
